revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing automatically generrated pages

revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Search}} ==Usage of this template and related alternatives== ===Template for creating a list of URLs searching for the same string=== This page's template creates a short, parenthetical list of abbreviated external links to different searchable locations for the same [[search string]]. This could be useful on a talk page to encourage researching a topic from a variety of sources. For example: {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} produces the following list of links to various searches for Alarm clock (hover over a link for a tooltip showing the search link's title): {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} The abbreviations stand for: * wp - Wikipedia search * gwp - [[Google]] search of Wikipedia * g - Google search * bwp - [[Microsoft Bing|Bing]] search of Wikipedia * b - Bing search * eb - [[Encyclopaedia Britannica]] search * co - [[Columbia Encyclopedia]] search * gct - Google search of the [[PC Magazine]] Encyclopedia * sw - [[ScienceWorld]] search (sister site of the more famous [[MathWorld]] site) * arc - [[Internet Archive]] search * ht - [[HathiTrust Digital Library]] search For an abbreviated list of links, omit the {{para|long|y}} parameter. {{Internal search templates common doc}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Search templates|Search]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Search}} ==Usage of this template and related alternatives== ===Template for creating a list of URLs searching for the same string=== This page's template creates a short, parenthetical list of abbreviated external links to different searchable locations for the same [[search string]]. This could be useful on a talk page to encourage researching a topic from a variety of sources. For example: {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} produces the following list of links to various searches for Alarm clock (hover over a link for a tooltip showing the search link's title): {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} The abbreviations stand for: * wp - Wikipedia search * gwp - [[:en:Google|Google]] search of Wikipedia * g - Google search * bwp - [[Microsoft Bing|Bing]] search of Wikipedia * b - Bing search * eb - [[Encyclopaedia Britannica]] search * co - [[Columbia Encyclopedia]] search * gct - Google search of the [[PC Magazine]] Encyclopedia * sw - [[ScienceWorld]] search (sister site of the more famous [[MathWorld]] site) * arc - [[Internet Archive]] search * ht - [[HathiTrust Digital Library]] search For an abbreviated list of links, omit the {{para|long|y}} parameter. {{Internal search templates common doc}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Search templates|Search]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Search}} ==Usage of this template and related alternatives== ===Template for creating a list of URLs searching for the same string=== This page's template creates a short, parenthetical list of abbreviated external links to different searchable locations for the same [[search string]]. This could be useful on a talk page to encourage researching a topic from a variety of sources. For example: {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} produces the following list of links to various searches for Alarm clock (hover over a link for a tooltip showing the search link's title): {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} The abbreviations stand for: * wp - Wikipedia search * gwp - [[:en:Google|Google]] search of Wikipedia * g - Google search * bwp - [[Microsoft Bing|Bing]] search of Wikipedia * b - Bing search * eb - [[Encyclopaedia Britannica]] search * co - [[Columbia Encyclopedia]] search * gct - Google search of the [[PC Magazine]] Encyclopedia * sw - [[ScienceWorld]] search (sister site of the more famous [[MathWorld]] site) * arc - [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] search * ht - [[HathiTrust Digital Library]] search For an abbreviated list of links, omit the {{para|long|y}} parameter. {{Internal search templates common doc}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Search templates|Search]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Search}} ==Usage of this template and related alternatives== ===Template for creating a list of URLs searching for the same string=== This page's template creates a short, parenthetical list of abbreviated external links to different searchable locations for the same [[search string]]. This could be useful on a talk page to encourage researching a topic from a variety of sources. For example: {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} produces the following list of links to various searches for Alarm clock (hover over a link for a tooltip showing the search link's title): {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} The abbreviations stand for: * wp - Wikipedia search * gwp - [[:en:Google|Google]] search of Wikipedia * g - Google search * bwp - [[Microsoft Bing|Bing]] search of Wikipedia * b - Bing search * eb - [[Encyclopaedia Britannica]] search * co - [[Columbia Encyclopedia]] search * gct - Google search of the [[PC Magazine]] Encyclopedia * sw - [[ScienceWorld]] search (sister site of the more famous [[MathWorld]] site) * arc - [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] search * ht - [[HathiTrust Digital Library]] search For an abbreviated list of links, omit the {{para|long|y}} parameter. {{Internal search templates common doc}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Search templates|Search]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Search}} ==Usage of this template and related alternatives== ===Template for creating a list of URLs searching for the same string=== This page's template creates a short, parenthetical list of abbreviated external links to different searchable locations for the same [[search string]]. This could be useful on a talk page to encourage researching a topic from a variety of sources. For example: {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} produces the following list of links to various searches for Alarm clock (hover over a link for a tooltip showing the search link's title): {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} The abbreviations stand for: * wp - Wikipedia search * gwp - [[:en:Google|Google]] search of Wikipedia * g - Google search * bwp - [[Microsoft Bing|Bing]] search of Wikipedia * b - Bing search * eb - [[Encyclopaedia Britannica]] search * co - [[Columbia Encyclopedia]] search * gct - Google search of the [[PC Magazine]] Encyclopedia * sw - [[ScienceWorld]] search (sister site of the more famous [[MathWorld]] site) * arc - [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] search * ht - [[HathiTrust Digital Library]] search For an abbreviated list of links, omit the {{para|long|y}} parameter. {{Internal search templates common doc}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Search templates|Search]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Search}} ==Usage of this template and related alternatives== ===Template for creating a list of URLs searching for the same string=== This page's template creates a short, parenthetical list of abbreviated external links to different searchable locations for the same [[search string]]. This could be useful on a talk page to encourage researching a topic from a variety of sources. For example: {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} produces the following list of links to various searches for Alarm clock (hover over a link for a tooltip showing the search link's title): {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} The abbreviations stand for: * wp - Wikipedia search * gwp - [[:en:Google|Google]] search of Wikipedia * g - Google search * bwp - [[Microsoft Bing|Bing]] search of Wikipedia * b - Bing search * eb - [[Encyclopaedia Britannica]] search * co - [[Columbia Encyclopedia]] search * gct - Google search of the [[PC Magazine]] Encyclopedia * sw - [[ScienceWorld]] search (sister site of the more famous [[MathWorld]] site) * arc - [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] search * ht - [[HathiTrust Digital Library]] search For an abbreviated list of links, omit the {{para|long|y}} parameter. {{Internal search templates common doc}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Search templates|Search]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Search}} ==Usage of this template and related alternatives== ===Template for creating a list of URLs searching for the same string=== This page's template creates a short, parenthetical list of abbreviated external links to different searchable locations for the same [[search string]]. This could be useful on a talk page to encourage researching a topic from a variety of sources. For example: {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} produces the following list of links to various searches for Alarm clock (hover over a link for a tooltip showing the search link's title): {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} The abbreviations stand for: * wp - Wikipedia search * gwp - [[:en:Google|Google]] search of Wikipedia * g - Google search * bwp - [[Microsoft Bing|Bing]] search of Wikipedia * b - Bing search * eb - [[Encyclopaedia Britannica]] search * co - [[Columbia Encyclopedia]] search * gct - Google search of the [[PC Magazine]] Encyclopedia * sw - [[ScienceWorld]] search (sister site of the more famous [[MathWorld]] site) * arc - [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] search * ht - [[HathiTrust Digital Library]] search For an abbreviated list of links, omit the {{para|long|y}} parameter. {{Internal search templates common doc}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Search templates|Search]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

This could be useful on a talk page to encourage researching a topic from a variety of sources. For example: {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} produces the following list of links to various searches for Alarm clock (hover over a link for a tooltip showing the search link's title): {{block indent|{{Search|Alarm clock|long=y}}}} The abbreviations stand for: * wp - Wikipedia search * gwp - [[:en:Google|Google]] search of Wikipedia * g - Google search * bwp - [[Microsoft Bing|Bing]] search of Wikipedia * b - Bing search * eb - [[Encyclopaedia Britannica]] search * co - [[Columbia Encyclopedia]] search * gct - Google search of the [[PC Magazine]] Encyclopedia * sw - [[ScienceWorld]] search (sister site of the more famous [[MathWorld]] site) * arc - [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] search * ht - [[HathiTrust Digital Library]] search For an abbreviated list of links, omit the {{para|long|y}} parameter. {{Internal search templates common doc}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Search templates|Search]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
